case.title: LUPTON MANUFACTURING CO. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: LUPTON MANUFACTURING CO. v. UNITED STATES, 388 U.S. 457 (1967)
opinion.h4: LUPTON MANUFACTURING CO. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF MISSOURI. No. 1296. Decided June 12, 1967.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Turner and Howard E. Shapiro for the United States, and Herbert A. Bergson, Daniel H. Margolis, Donald L. Hardison and William K. Unverzagt for Aluminum Co. of America et al., appellees.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed.
